records.ety: [F., fr. LL. financia payment of money, money, fr. finare to pay a fine or subsidy (cf. OF. finer to finish, pay), fr. L. finis end. See Fine, n., Finish.]

defs: The income of a ruler or of a state; revenue; public money; sometimes, the income of an individual; often used in the plural for funds; available money; resources.
quotes: All the finances or revenues of the imperial crown.

defs: The science of raising and expending the public revenue.

records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Financed (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Financing.]

defs: To conduct the finances of; to provide for, and manage, the capital for; to financier.
quotes: Securing foreign capital to finance multitudinous undertakings.
